title: Tecticornia australasica

Tecticornia australasica is native to Australia and is commonly found in the coastal regions.

intro: Tecticornia australasica, also known as blue saltbush, is a halophytic shrub native to Australia, characterized by its small, blue-green leaves and ability to thrive in saline environments. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant activity, providing relief from various health conditions.
